name: SZZT Electronics CO.,LTD
summary: SZZT Electronics CO.,LTD provides financial payment information security products primarily in Asia, America, Europe, and the Middle East. The company offers point of sale, kiosk, encrypted pin pad, component, and tax products, as well as financial security payment solutions. It serves the banking, traffic, retail, medical care, tourism, and O2O industries. SZZT Electronics CO.,LTD was founded in 1993 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
